name: Nothic

traits.name: Immunities
traits.text: Lightning, Slashing; Charmed, Deafened, Exhaustion, Frightened, Grappled, Prone, Restrained

traits.name: Amorphous
traits.text: The jelly can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: The jelly can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

text:
# Nothic

*Large Ooze, Unaligned*

### Actions

**Pseudopod.** Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 12 (3d6 + 2) Acid damage.
